debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : Countable V
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ Measure.map (fun ω => G ω ⊔ H ω) P =
    @SimpleGraph.binomialRandom V (unitInterval.symm (unitInterval.symm p * unitInterval.symm q))

proof:
by
    have h := (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl
    simp only [compl_inf, compl_compl] at h
    exact h.map_eq
failed_attempts:
by
    have : (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) = (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) := by
      ext ω; simp only [compl_sup]
    rw [this]
    exact (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq

by
    have : (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) = (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) := by
      ext ω; simp only [compl_inf_compl_eq_sup]
    rw [this]
    exact (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq

    simp only [compl_inf, compl_compl] at h
    exact h.map_eq
